description: Built a collection of Windhawk mods for Windows system customization. Focused on lightweight, targeted tweaks that change how Windows behaves under the hood.
Designed and built an interactive web-based assessment application for Tier-1 SOC Analysts. Full UI, question flow, and scoring system — built to actually feel good to use.
Complex MITM attack tool that intercepts and reveals HTTP/HTTPS traffic on a connected network. Deep dive into packet manipulation and network-layer visibility.
Released a wave of focused CLI tools: HellCat (hashcat shortcut for Windows), KaliQuickFix (auto-resolves common Kali apt errors), and Bundler (packages links for easy sharing).
